title.en: Elasticsearch Internals: Lucene Storage, Cluster Coordination, and Replication Mechanisms
title.zh: Elasticsearch 底层架构：Lucene 存储、集群协调与复制机制分析

summary.en: A systematic analysis of Elasticsearch internals, including Lucene storage, inverted indexes, Doc Values, BKD Tree, FST, segments, translog, cluster coordination, Zen2, and primary-backup shard replication.
summary.zh: 系统分析 Elasticsearch 基于 Lucene 的底层存储结构、倒排索引、Doc Values、BKD Tree、FST、segment、translog、集群协调、Zen2 和 primary-backup 分片复制机制。

readingDirection.en: Read this when studying why Elasticsearch is not a generic KV store, where Lucene query efficiency comes from, how shard replication consistency works, or how Zen2 coordination and read/write paths behave.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在理解 Elasticsearch 为什么不是普通 KV 存储、Lucene 查询效率来源、分片复制一致性、Zen2 集群协调或读写路径时阅读。
